snippet.title: Gehra Hua - Audio | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Sara Arjun, Shashwat Sachdev, Arijit Singh
snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

рЯСЙ Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua

#GehraHua 
#dhurandhar 
#ranveersingh 
#arijitsingh 
#shashwatsachdev 
#saraarjun

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher NolanвАЩs next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX¬Ѓ film technology. The film brings HomerвАЩs foundational saga to IMAX¬Ѓ film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita NyongвАЩo, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

Christopher NolanвАЩs next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX¬Ѓ film technology. The film brings HomerвАЩs foundational saga to IMAX¬Ѓ film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita NyongвАЩo, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer Review by Deeksha Sharma. Bandar Movie Featuring Bobby Deol & Sanya Malhotra Directed by Anurag Kashyap is based on real life Crime thriller which shook bollywood film industry whereas Kartavya Trailer Featuring Saif Ali Khan on Netflix is a Hunt Thriller for Truth which uncovers a dark story with New Villain Lallantop Saurabh Dwivedi. Bandar Teaser Review & Kartavya Trailer Netflix backed by Shahrukh Khan & Red Chillies Reaction would be shared in this Video. Bobby Deol 2.0 with Director Anurag Kashyap or Saif Ali Khan in Action Thriller- What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#Bandar #BandarTeaser #Kartavya

snippet.title: Cape Fear вАФ Official Trailer | Apple TV
snippet.description:
Out of prison, and out for revenge. Cape Fear premieres June 5 on Apple TV
https://apple.co/_CapeFear

Inspired by the 1991 remake directed by Martin Scorsese and produced by Steven Spielberg, a storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna (Amy Adams) and Tom Bowden (Patrick Wilson) when Max Cady (Javier Bardem), the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison вАФ and he wants vengeance. 

Hailing from UCP, a division of Universal Studio Group, and Amblin Television, вАЬCape FearвАЭ is based on both the novel вАЬThe Executioners,вАЭ which inspired Gregory PeckвАЩs Universal Pictures feature (1962) of the same name, as well as the acclaimed 1991 remake directed by Scorsese. The series is executive produced by Steven Spielberg, who produced the 1991 film, alongside Scorsese. Creator Nick Antosca showruns and produces alongside Alex Hedlund for Eat The Cat, and Darryl Frank and Justin Falvey produce alongside Spielberg for Amblin Television. Academy Award nominee Morten Tyldum will direct the pilot and serve as executive producer. The series is developed and produced through AntoscaвАЩs overall deal at UCP, where heвАЩs been based since 2017.

Subscribe to Apple TVвАЩs YouTube channel: https://apple.co/AppleTVYouTube

Follow Apple TV:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/AppleTV
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@AppleTV
Facebook: https://facebook.com/AppleTV
Threads: https://threads.com/@AppleTV
X: https://X.com/AppleTV
Giphy: https://giphy.com/AppleTV

More from Apple TV: https://apple.co/32qgOEJ

Apple TV is a streaming service with original stories from the most creative minds in TV and film. Watch now on the Apple TV app: https://apple.co/_AppleTVapp Subscription required for Apple TV

en.title: Cape Fear вАФ Official Trailer | Apple TV
en.description:
Out of prison, and out for revenge. Cape Fear premieres June 5 on Apple TV
https://apple.co/_CapeFear

Inspired by the 1991 remake directed by Martin Scorsese and produced by Steven Spielberg, a storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna (Amy Adams) and Tom Bowden (Patrick Wilson) when Max Cady (Javier Bardem), the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison вАФ and he wants vengeance. 

Hailing from UCP, a division of Universal Studio Group, and Amblin Television, вАЬCape FearвАЭ is based on both the novel вАЬThe Executioners,вАЭ which inspired Gregory PeckвАЩs Universal Pictures feature (1962) of the same name, as well as the acclaimed 1991 remake directed by Scorsese. The series is executive produced by Steven Spielberg, who produced the 1991 film, alongside Scorsese. Creator Nick Antosca showruns and produces alongside Alex Hedlund for Eat The Cat, and Darryl Frank and Justin Falvey produce alongside Spielberg for Amblin Television. Academy Award nominee Morten Tyldum will direct the pilot and serve as executive producer. The series is developed and produced through AntoscaвАЩs overall deal at UCP, where heвАЩs been based since 2017.

snippet.title: BAVA BAVA Lyrical | CITYLIGHTS | Vinay Rajkumar | Monisha Vijaykumar | Charan Raj | Vijaya Kumar
snippet.description:
рЯФ• Warning: Extreme Mass Alert! рЯЪ® BAVA BAVA is finally here
Presenting The BAVA BAVA Lyrical from the Movie #CITYLIGHTS  Starring : Vinay Rajkumar, Monisha Vijaykumar & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
-----------------------------------------
#CITYLIGHTS #bavabava #citylightsmovie #vinayrajkumar #anandaudio  
#duniyavijaykumar  #charanraj #monishavijaykumar  #youtube #ankithkumar  
-----------------------------------------
Lyrics by Ankith Kumar 
Follow on: https://www.instagram.com/ankith_kumarr/

Lyrics:
Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna ka un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka

Eh patte Kya re khana kaya 
Mamu ka dukhan meh by two chaya
Pileko hojata dimaku Maya 
Shivajinagar meh nalli ka paya

Bat alli bitre odyod onde shotuu
Nenskobek makla niv harishchandra ghatu
Touch madthini anod beda ma thougtuu
Vade paisa aksthini kalskodla date uuu...

Odu odu odu tirgbeda hinde 
Yamunange kansthini annamun munde
Yak hutde antha ning ansbeko munde
Good morning helalla kaldoithya Sunday 

Thilkondu  fight madu alka nan magne
Baik bandid boglmana badko ya magne
En thanteg barmana udrushu pallu
Ammaniiiii bandaka pullu

Nangle niyathkal manshru 
Eppunu engluke ben hinde vakraga sooori
Niyath kala illa  illi nambidake jothe idu game adi akidu choori

Thinrudu sheesh kali baluk mav Adada etu 
dodthale ethnappa kudkurdu rate uuuu...
Thale kedskolalla nanu hidkyoke slate uuu
Estojana ote urig madode hate uuu

Onak sheesh thindotu daulattu peshii
Draggeruu nugshanaka barodilla teshii
Sadilde nin body Kalsthini kaashi
Gothilde hutidya gothilla Raashi

Parents ge yavathu ursbeda otte 
Avr mathu kellilla jail uta thatte
Sirki savasu ni shekmana kotte 
Sheknaka un lifuuu bod bod motte 

Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka
----------

snippet.title: Evil Dead Burn | Official Trailer | In Cinemas July 9, 2026
snippet.description:
One hell of a family reunion. Evil Dead Burn only in cinemas on July 9. #EvilDeadBurn рЯФ•

Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchiseвАЩs most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into DeaditesвАФturning the gathering into a family reunion from hellвАФshe comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Cast: Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

Director: S√©bastien VaniƒНek

IN CINEMAS JULY 9, 2026
#EvilDeadBurn

а∞≤а∞≤а∞ња∞§ а∞Єа∞єа∞Єа±На∞∞а∞®а∞Ња∞Ѓа∞В а∞µа∞ња∞Ва∞Яа±З а∞Жа∞∞а±Ла∞Ча±На∞ѓа∞В, а∞Ра∞ґа±На∞µа∞∞а±На∞ѓа∞В, а∞Єа±Ма∞≠а∞Ња∞Ча±На∞ѓа∞В а∞Ха∞≤а±Ба∞Ча±Ба∞§а±Ба∞Ва∞¶а∞њ | Lalitha Sahasranam Stotram

Listen to the sacred Sri Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram and experience the divine blessings of Goddess Lalitha Devi. рЯЩП

It is believed that listening to Lalitha Sahasranamam even once can bring health, wealth, prosperity, and good fortune into your life. This powerful stotram removes negativity, brings peace of mind, and fills your home with positive energy and abundance.

In this video, you can listen to the full Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram with Telugu lyrics, making it easy to follow and chant along.

snippet.title: а§Ѓа•Иа§В а§§а•За§∞а•З а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ѓа•За§В а§™а§Ња§Ча§≤ | Prem Bandhan | Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar Songs
snippet.description:
рЯОґ Immerse yourself in the timeless romance of Kishore Kumar and Lata Mangeshkar with 'Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal' from the movie Prem Bandhan! Relive the magic of 1979, as these legendary voices weave a tale of love and longing. Let the nostalgic melodies transport you to an era of pure emotions and heartfelt expressions.

Experience the golden era of Bollywood with this enchanting duet, a testament to the unparalleled artistry of Kishore Da and Lata Ji. Feel the depth of emotion in every note as they serenade your soul with their unforgettable voices. This song is a treasure trove of memories, capturing the essence of love in its purest form.



Credits :

Song: Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal
Album: Prem Bandhan
Artist: Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghumti hoon
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Sawan ko dhundti hoom
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Aur chatakne lagti hai
Kitni kaliya kaliyo mein
Main tera pata sabhi se
Aise puchhta hu jaise main koi
Bhula rahi manjil ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Aankhe aankhe
Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Kitni gehari jhil hai ye
Jhil se gehari do aankhe
Main teri in aankho mein
Aise dubti hu jaise main koi
Tuti naiya manjhe ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Tu ho na ho aankho mein
Rahti teri surat hai
Ye man prem ka mandir hai
Jisme teri ye murat hai
Main teri is murat ko
Aise pujti hoon jaise main koi
Vyakul radha mohan ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Sawan ko dhundti hoon
Barkha ko dhundata hoon.

snippet.title: Toota Jo Kabhi Tara 8K Video | A Flying Jatt | Tiger Shroff, Jacqueline | Sumedha K | Sachin Jigar
snippet.description:
Experience pure romance with Toota Jo Kabhi Tara from the movie A Flying Jatt, featuring the charming onвАСscreen chemistry of Tiger Shroff and Jacqueline Fernandez.
рЯОґ Beautifully composed by the talented SachinвАУJigar, this song expresses love, hope, and emotional connection through soulful melodies and heartfelt moments. Presented in 8K Ultra HD, the visuals are richer, sharper, and more immersive than ever, enhancing every romantic scene.

Title : Toota Jo Kabhi Tara
Singer: Sumedha Karmahe
Lyrics : Priya Saraiya
Music : Sachin-Jigar
Arrangers/Programmers : Sachin-Jigar & Tanuj Tiku
Mixed&Mastered at : Future Sound of Bombay by Eric Pillai
Strings - Chennai Strings
Flute - Naveen Kumar
Music Production Head : Romil Ved

Cast : Tiger Shroff, Jacqueline Fernandez
Banner : Balaji Motion Pictures
Producer : Shobha Kapoor & Ekta Kapoor
Director : Remo D'Souza

snippet.title: Escaping horror forest with train gameplay on vtg!
snippet.description:
Forest Escape: Last Train is a co-op horror exploration game for 1-4 players in the mysterious forest. Repair your locomotive, solve the insane WardenвАЩs eerie puzzles, and outrun the stuff of nightmares as you try to escape this twisted realm.

#forestescape #vtg #vasanthtamilgaming #trainhorror #choochoocharles #gaming

snippet.title: Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum рЯТФ Ye Dil Ab Maan Gaya | Soulful Sufi Qawwali | New Sad Qawwali 2026
snippet.description:
"Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum рЯТФ Ye Dil Ab Maan GayaвАЭ ek dil ko chhoo lene wala soulful Sufi Qawwali ishq song hai jo mohabbat ke dard, judaai ki takleef aur tanha raaton ki kahani bayan karta hai. Yeh gaana un logon ke liye hai jinhone kabhi sachcha ishq kiya hai aur usme toot gaye hain.

Is qawwali mein ek aashiq ke dil ka haal bayan hota hai jo apni mehbooba ki yaadon se bhaagna chahta hai, lekin har raat woh yaadein usse aur gehra zakhm de jaati hain. Sharab sirf ek bahana hai, asal mein woh apne dard ko sulane ki koshish karta hai.

Yeh gaana Sufi andaaz mein ishq-e-majazi se ishq-e-haqeeqi tak ka safar bhi dikhata hai. Jab duniya ke pyaar mein insaan toot jaata hai, tab woh Rab ki taraf mudta hai. Har lafz, har sur aur har ehsaas is gaane mein dil ki gehraiyon se nikla hai.

Agar aapko sad songs, qawwali, ya Sufi music pasand hai, toh yeh gaana aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo lega.

рЯСН Like karein
рЯТђ Comment karke apni feelings share karein
рЯФФ Channel ko subscribe karein aur bell icon dabayein

Lyrics:

Kabhi-kabhiвА¶ Hum jis insaan ke liye sab kuch chhod dete hainвА¶ Wahi humein ye sikha jaata haiвА¶ Ki hum uske bina hi behtar theвА¶"


"Maine socha thaвА¶ Tu meri duniya haiвА¶ Par sach ye thaвА¶ Main teri duniya mein kahin tha hi nahiвА¶ Tu gayaвА¶ to dard huaвА¶ Par usi dard ne batayaвА¶ Ki hum tere bagair hi acche theвА¶"


"Tere saath hanste hue bhi roya hoon main, Tere bina ab sukoon se soya hoon mainвА¶ Ajeeb hai ye ishq ka fasana bhi, Tujhe paakar khoyaвА¶ tujhe khokar paaya hoon mainвА¶"


Tere bagair acche the humвА¶ Ye dil ab maan gayaвА¶ Tu tha to khoye hue the, Tu gaya to jaan gayaвА¶


Tere saath har lamha bhaari tha, Par maine use pyaar kahaвА¶ Teri har khamoshi ko maine, Apna ikraar kahaвА¶
Maine khud ko tujh mein khoya, Har sapna tujhpe vaar diyaвА¶ Tune badle mein kya diya, Bas ek toota sa sansaar diyaвА¶


"Log kehte hainвА¶ Mohabbat sukoon deti haiвА¶ Par shayadвА¶ Galat insaan se mohabbatвА¶ Sukoon cheen leti haiвА¶"


Tere bagair acche the humвА¶ Ab ye ehsaas huaвА¶ Tere saath rehkar hi kyun, Dil itna udaas huaвА¶


Ab jo tu nahi hai paas mere, Saansein bhi halki lagti hainвА¶ Tere diye hue saare zakhm, Ab aadat si lagti hainвА¶
Maine khud se rishta joda, Dil ko phir samjhaya haiвА¶ Tu ek sabak tha zindagi ka, Jisne mujhe banaya haiвА¶


"Tu mila bhi to dard dekar, Tu gaya bhi to sukoon dekarвА¶ Ab na koi shikayat tujhse, Main jee raha hoon khud ko lekarвА¶"


Tere jhooth pe yakeen kiya, Har dhokhe ko apna liyaвА¶ Maine tujhe apna samjha, Tune mujhe hi gair kiyaвА¶
Ab jo door hoon tujhse, To sach saaf dikhai deta haiвА¶ Tu kabhi mera tha hi nahi, Ye dil ab samajh leta haiвА¶


"Kabhi-kabhiвА¶ Kisi ka chale jaanaвА¶ Tujhe todta nahiвА¶ Tujhe sach dikha jaata haiвА¶"


"Tu tha to main khoya thaвА¶ Tu gaya to main paaya hoonвА¶ Tere bagair hi sahiвА¶ Ab khud mein samaya hoonвА¶"


Tere bagair acche the humвА¶ Ab dil ye kehta haiвА¶ Tu ek beeta hua kissa hai, Jo ab na rehta haiвА¶
Ab na koi dard baaki hai, Na koi adhoori raatвА¶ Main khud mein hi poora hoon, Yahi hai meri aukaatвА¶

"Kuch rishteвА¶ Khatam nahi hoteвА¶ Bas humeinвА¶ Khud se milakarвА¶ Chale jaate hainвА¶"

                                  Lyrics
Piya moye bhoot satave re 
Piya moye bhoot satave re 
Hye sovan na de bhencho sari rat jagave se 
Male 
Rog tero jad su mitvaye du 
rog tero jad su mitvaye du
Me behronath ko chelo chal tere jhada lagvayedu 
Fimale 
Pipal niche gyi balam meri khichi naram kalai 
Patte far far hale re mero hy gyo bp hai 
Piya meri nabaj dikhaye de re 
Piya meri nabaj dikhaye de re
Male
Chal bheronath ke mandir baba rog hataye de re 
Bhencho bhoot bhagaye dungo 
Bhencho bhoot bhagaye dungo
Jo raji raji na mane to lath bajaye dungo 
Fimale
Cham cham ki awaj balam mere kanan me aave 
Hye bado besharm bhoot piya meri chati pe chadh jave 
Aaj meri jaan bachaye le re 
Aaj meri jaan bachaye le re
Male 
Chal bheronath ke mandir baba rog hataye de re 
Bhencho bhoot bhagaye dungo 
Bhencho bhoot bhagaye dungo

snippet.title: Ee Manase Full Video Song | Ustaad Bhagat Singh | Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela | Harish Shankar
snippet.description:
Fall in love with the soulful melody вАЬEe Manase Se SeвАЭ from Ustaad Bhagat Singh, starring Power Star Pawan Kalyan and the sensational Sreeleela.

This romantic masterpiece captures the essence of love, emotions, and connection through mesmerizing visuals and heartfelt music рЯТЦ

The evergreen voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam adds soul to this track, while music director Deva delivers a timeless melody. The poetic brilliance of Sirivennala Seetharama Sastry makes every line unforgettable.

Directed by Harish Shankar, this song blends modern visuals with classic romantic vibes, making it a must-watch for every Telugu music lover.

#EeManaseSeSe #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #Sreeleela #SPB #SPBalasubrahmanyam #DevaMusic #Sirivennala #HarishShankar #TeluguSongs #TeluguLoveSongs #RomanticSongs #Tollywood #LahariMusic #MelodySongs #TeluguMelody #LoveSongTelugu #TrendingTeluguSongs #4KTeluguSongs #NewTeluguSongs #toliprema

snippet.description:
Revisit the magic of "Chunnari Chunnari," the timeless hit from the blockbuster movie Biwi No.1! Starring Salman Khan and Sushmita Sen.
Credits:
Singers: Abhijeet & Anuradha Sriram
Music Director: Anu Malik
Producer: Vashu Bhagnani
Director: David Dhawan
Lyrics Snippet:
Aaja Na Chhu Le Meri Chunnari Sanam,
Kuch Na Main Bolun Tujhe Meri Kasam.
Aayi Jawaani Sar Pe Mere,
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Jawaani Bereham...
Enjoy this classic 90s track!
Don't forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more music!

snippet.title: FranklinвАЩs Son Got HurtвА¶ So He Built a Hospital вЭ§пЄП GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin, Shinchan, Shiranui and their family were happily spending time near a pond when suddenly FranklinвАЩs son gets badly injured рЯШҐ They rush to a hospital for treatment but soon realize the hospital is completely corrupted and dangerous! Doctors only care about money and try to scam FranklinвАЩs family рЯТФ

Shinchan accidentally discovers the hospitalвАЩs dark secret and informs Franklin. After getting thrown out by the evil hospital owner, Franklin meets an old doctor who truly helps his son вЭ§пЄП Later Franklin decides to build a new hospital for the city with the help of Shiranui, Simeon and Shinchan рЯФ• But the evil hospital owner plans a dangerous revengeвА¶

Watch till the end for emotional moments, comedy, action and a massive climax explosion рЯТ•

snippet.title: I BECOME A BUS DRIVER FOR A DAY!рЯФ•ULTRA REALISTIC BUS GAME
snippet.description:
REBUILDING an OLD LAMBORGHINI to FASTEST LAMBO EVER! рЯФ• - Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29

What happens when you take a forgotten, beat-up Lamborghini and transform it into an absolute speed monster? In this Forza Horizon 5 build, we're doing the IMPOSSIBLE! рЯЪА

Watch as we take a neglected Lamborghini from the junkyard, completely rebuild it, tune every component, and push it beyond its limits to create what might just be the FASTEST Lamborghini ever built in Forza Horizon 5! All played with the Logitech G29 steering wheel for the ultimate sim racing experience
